school.name: S.J.M. Public School
school.hero_desc: A premier co-educational school located in Govindapura, Nagawara, Bangalore. Committed to nurturing young minds, fostering holistic development, and encouraging intellectual excellence.

home.feature_stem_desc: Balanced intellectual curriculum emphasizing mathematics, environmental science, and creative languages.
home.feature_arts_desc: Encouraging expression through public speaking, performing arts, painting, and physical education.
home.feature_humanities_desc: Nurturing sound character, civil responsibility, respect, and global citizenship.

academics.title: ICSE Academic Curriculum
academics.subtitle: Discover our comprehensive education path, state-of-the-art labs, and class structures.
academics.grade_primary_desc: Building strong foundational skills in math, basic coding, language arts, and environment awareness.
academics.grade_middle_desc: Enhancing analytical thinking, scientific inquiry, social studies, and languages.
academics.grade_senior_desc: Advanced learning tracks preparing students for ICSE Board Examinations with specialized computer applications.
academics.lab_quantum_desc: Fully equipped workspace for practical experiments in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology.
academics.lab_design_desc: Dedicated workstations for software literacy, basic algorithm design, and coding skills.

admissions.title: Admissions Information
admissions.subtitle: Begin your child's journey towards academic and character development.
admissions.guide_step1_desc: Complete our quick online registration form with candidate details and guardian contacts.
admissions.guide_step2_desc: Visit the school campus with birth certificate and previous academic reports for check.
admissions.guide_step3_desc: A warm, friendly dialogue with the principal to align on the school values and student goals.
admissions.form_agree: I confirm the accuracy of all submitted details.
admissions.success_message: Your inquiry has been successfully logged! Our admissions counselor will contact you within 24 hours.

gallery.title: Visual Campus Archives
gallery.subtitle: Glimpse into the daily life, celebrations, and infrastructure at Sri Jnana Maruthi Vidyalaya.
gallery.simulated_desc: Explore high-resolution visual memories of our vibrant school campus, playgrounds, and events.

contact.title: Contact & Support
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with our administrative office for fee details, admissions, or suggestions.
contact.success: Your message has been sent successfully!
contact.address_val: Opposite Glass Factory Bus Stop, Umar Nagar, Govindapura, Nagawara, Bangalore - 560045

awards.title: Milestones of Excellence
awards.subtitle: Celebrating the achievements and laurels of S.J.M. Public School in academic, sporting, and creative domains.

academics.title: Academic Achievements
academics.desc: Exemplary performance in ICSE board examinations, subject toppers, and state-level scholarship awards.

items.title: ICSE State Topper (Grade 10)
items.desc: Secured a historic 99.2% in the ICSE Board Examinations, ranking 3rd state-wide.

items.title: National Math Olympiad Gold Medal
items.desc: Won the prestigious gold medal by achieving 1st Rank internationally in Mathematics.

items.title: Karnataka Merit Scholarship
items.desc: Awarded for exceptional academic progress and top scores in state-wide screening exams.

sports.title: Sports & Athletics Champions
sports.desc: Trophies and medals won in inter-school football, athletic track events, basketball, and chess tournaments.

items.title: Inter-School Football Championship
items.desc: Won the championship trophy after defeating the opponents in a thrilling penalty shootout.

items.title: State Athletics Meet Gold Medal (100m)
items.desc: Clocked a record 11.2 seconds to win gold in the 100-meter sprint category.

items.title: Inter-School Chess Master Cup
items.desc: Remained undefeated throughout the 7-round Swiss system tournament to claim the top spot.

science.title: Science & Tech Laurels
science.desc: Recognition at regional science fairs, robotics exhibits, and inter-school coding hackathons.

items.title: First Prize - Bangalore Science & Tech Fair
items.desc: Developed a working prototype of a low-cost automated smart irrigation system utilizing soil sensors.

items.title: Outstanding Innovator Award (Robotics)
items.desc: Designed a search-and-rescue robot capable of navigating obstacles using ultrasonic sensors.

items.title: Inter-School Coding Hackathon Winner
items.desc: Created a lightweight student portal application in under 24 hours focusing on user accessibility.

arts.title: Creative Arts & Cultural Glory
arts.desc: Laurels in classical dance, theatrical performances, public speaking competitions, and canvas painting.

items.title: Best Theatrical Production Cup
items.desc: Staged an original play on environmental conservation, winning Best Script and Best Actor awards.

items.title: Classical Dance Championship (Bharatanatyam)
items.desc: Secured first prize for a solo performance showcasing impeccable expressive mudras.

items.title: All-Bangalore English Debate First Prize
items.desc: Emerged winner after debating on the ethical implications of artificial intelligence in education.
